note: Bridging & Triage Programs and Total People Accommodated are not published to the City of Toronto open data (CKAN) export. These figures are scraped daily from the City's shelter census page (toronto.ca/shelter-census) when the City posts them. Data is available from 2026-05-26 onward. Days where the City did not publish a table (weekends, holidays) will be absent unless the City retroactively posts catch-up tables on a subsequent day.
